title: Hugo (disambiguation)
content:
'''Hugo''' may refer to:
*'''[[Hugo (exoboar)|Hugo]]''', an [[exoboar]]
*'''''[[Hugo]]''''', a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]]
*'''[[Hugo Bartyn]]''', founder of [[Bartyn's Landing]] on [[Lamaredd/Legends|Lamaredd]]
*'''[[Hugo Cutter]]''', member of the [[Red Moons]] mercenary unit
*'''[[Hugo Eckener/Legends|Hugo Eckener]]''', Chief Architect serving the [[Naboo Royal Advisory Council/Legends|Naboo Royal Advisory Council]]
*'''[[Hugo Treece]]''', [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] placed in charge of [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] after the Imperial occupation in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]
*'''[[Mt. Hugo|Mount Hugo]]''', tallest peak on the planet [[Lamaredd/Legends|Lamaredd]]
{{Disambig}}
